messages.content: You are a local assistant. Return only the requested answer.
Route this request: convert a phone photo of a grocery receipt into a spreadsheet.
{"route":"document_to_excel","tool":"vision_extract","reason":"receipt spreadsheet conversion"}
Summarize briefly.
The article says the library has a ramp entrance, large-print forms, and staff help near the front desk.
The library has ramp access, large-print forms, and front-desk staff who can help visitors.
Include source markers when summarizing.
Source A says the invoice includes VAT. Source B says payment can be made by bank transfer.
The invoice includes VAT [source: A]. Payment can be made by bank transfer [source: B].
Return a JSON tool call.
Create a PDF copy of the extracted bank-statement summary.
{"tool":"pdf_export","arguments":{"source":"bank_statement_summary","format":"pdf"}}
Repair invalid JSON and return only JSON.
{tool: excel_export, args:{sheet: transactions}}
{"tool":"excel_export","arguments":{"sheet":"transactions"}}
Explain in plain language for an elderly user.
What does due date mean on a utility bill?
The due date is the last day to pay the bill on time. Paying after that date may add a late fee.
Warn about uncertainty and human review.
Can this receipt prove my insurance claim will be accepted?
It may help, but it does not guarantee approval. Please verify the claim requirements with the insurer or a qualified human reviewer.
Return a JSON tool call.
Run local safety checks before showing a financial explanation.
{"tool":"safety_checks","arguments":{"category":"financial","require_human_review":true}}
